featured.title: RoCE-enabled L3EVPN over EVPN-VXLAN (Spine–Leaf Fabric)
featured.description: An EVPN-VXLAN L3 fabric with IRB and multiple VNIs in Containerlab on Nokia SR Linux. Implemented soft-RoCE inside containerized VMs and a host-driven load-balancing scheme by customizing RXE source-port allocation (replacing QP-hashing) for better flow distribution.

featured.title: Deepfake Audio Detection on the FoR Dataset
featured.description: Compared statistical classifiers and an ensemble on the Fake-or-Real dataset; logistic regression gave the most balanced accuracy across real and fake audio, and SVM showed a clear real-audio bias.

other.title: ChatINC
other.description: A realtime MERN-stack chat app with Tailwind CSS and Socket.IO, using token-based auth with cookies for sessions.

other.title: FinartZ
other.description: A full-stack blog site (HTML, CSS, JS, MySQL, PHP) with admin and normal users.

other.title: GameHub
other.description: A game-discovery web app built with React + TypeScript and Chakra UI, using the RAWG API.
